$comment: SDKs whose free tier requires a credit card on file, or which have no credible CC-free tier at all. Keep narrow — SDKs with real free tiers without CC (Sentry, Upstash, Pusher Sandbox, Resend, AI Studio Gemini, Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth) must stay out of this list so the free-tier-compliance CI gate doesn't false-positive on them. Entries match exact package name or prefix (e.g. `@stripe/` catches `@stripe/anything`).

notes.openai: OpenAI has a free-trial $5 credit but requires CC from deploy. Use AI Studio Gemini instead.
notes.@anthropic-ai/sdk: Anthropic API requires CC. Not usable under the zero-cost stance without operator opt-in.
notes.@aws-sdk/: Any AWS usage in craftstack would need a billing account even for S3/SES free tiers (CC required at signup).
notes.@google-cloud/: Separate from Google AI Studio. Cloud Console services require billing.
notes.@vercel/kv|postgres|blob: Paid-tier Vercel storage. Hobby free tier gives only preview-sized quotas that still require CC for any production use.
notes.sentry-exception: NOT blocked — @sentry/nextjs free tier is 5k events/month with no CC required.
notes.upstash-exception: NOT blocked — Upstash Redis free tier is 10k commands/day with no CC required.
notes.pusher-exception: NOT blocked — Pusher Sandbox is 200k messages/day with no CC required.
notes.resend-exception: NOT blocked — Resend free tier is 100 emails/day with no CC required.
